overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V showing a stationary first-person view from the shoulder of a multi-lane highway. Vehicles pass by in both directions under orange sodium street lights, with distant urban lights visible on the horizon and a concrete barrier running along the right side.

Orange sodium street lights cast a warm glow over the multi-lane road as various vehicles including a red pickup and military truck pass by on the left. A concrete barrier runs along the right edge, and distant city lights twinkle on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective on a nighttime highway shoulder, capturing a steady stream of diverse traffic under a warm, artificial glow. It begins with a view of the multi-lane road where orange sodium street lights illuminate passing vehicles, including a red pickup and a military truck, against a backdrop of twinkling city lights on the horizon. As the camera shifts slightly to the left, the flow of traffic evolves to include a slow-moving white RV and motorcycles traversing the worn, patched asphalt, before a black sports car suddenly streaks past in close proximity. The scene then transitions into a sequence dominated by larger commercial transport, with a green delivery truck, a white van, and a red semi-truck passing by. Finally, the camera remains fixed on the shoulder as the nocturnal traffic continues to surge forward under the consistent amber lighting.
